questions: Stay positive and look on the bright side. You find an old photo of you and a friend you've lost touch with. What do you think about?
Stay positive and look on the bright side. Your favorite coffee shop just closed permanently. How do you feel about it?
Stay positive and look on the bright side. You finish the last episode of a TV series you've been watching for years. What are your thoughts?
Stay positive and look on the bright side. A coworker you were close with just accepted a job in another city. How do you feel?
Stay positive and look on the bright side. You drive past the neighborhood where you grew up and notice everything has changed. What goes through your mind?
Stay positive and look on the bright side. You find an old toy from your childhood while cleaning out a closet. What do you think about?
Stay positive and look on the bright side. The restaurant where you had your first date closed down. How do you feel about that?
Stay positive and look on the bright side. Your favorite park bench has been removed and replaced with a new one. What do you think?
Stay positive and look on the bright side. You hear a song that reminds you of a friend who moved away years ago. What do you feel?
Stay positive and look on the bright side. Your neighbor's friendly dog, who always greeted you on walks, passed away. How do you respond?
Stay positive and look on the bright side. You find out your college campus tore down the building where most of your classes were. What do you think?
Stay positive and look on the bright side. Your kid no longer wants to hold your hand when crossing the street. How do you feel about that?
Stay positive and look on the bright side. You're packing up your desk on your last day at a job you've had for five years. What are you thinking?
Stay positive and look on the bright side. You come across a handwritten letter from a grandparent who passed years ago. How do you react?
